votes.reason: The Python code correctly implements the Coq specification, counting uppercase vowels at even indices.
The Python code implements the same logic as the Coq code, counting uppercase vowels at even indices.
The Python code correctly implements the Coq specification, counting uppercase vowels at even indices.

Both implementations count uppercase vowels (A, E, I, O, U) at even indices (0, 2, 4, ...). The Coq code uses filter on indices checking Nat.even and is_uppercase_vowel_bool, while Python iterates with i % 2 == 0 check. Both use 0-based indexing and the same vowel set. The logic is equivalent for all concrete string inputs.

Both implementations count uppercase vowels (A, E, I, O, U) at even indices (0, 2, 4, ...). The Coq code uses filter and length to count indices where Nat.even i is true and the character is an uppercase vowel. The Python code iterates through indices, checking i % 2 == 0 and membership in the uppercase vowel list. Both use 0-based indexing and the same definition of even (divisible by 2). The pre-condition is trivially true in both, and the spec checks equality with the implementation result.

Both implementations count uppercase vowels (A, E, I, O, U) at even indices (0, 2, 4, ...). The Coq code uses filter and length on indices where Nat.even i is true and the character is an uppercase vowel. The Python code iterates through indices, checking i % 2 == 0 and if the character is in the uppercase vowel list. Both use 0-based indexing and the same definition of even (divisible by 2). The pre-condition is trivially true in both, and the spec checks equality with the implementation result.
Both implementations count characters A,E,I,O,U at even (0-based) indices over the string range 0..len-1, returning the same count for all inputs.
Both count uppercase vowels A/E/I/O/U at even (0-based) indices and return the same count for all inputs; precondition and spec match.
Both implementations count positions i in 0..len(s)-1 where i is even and s[i] is one of A,E,I,O,U. Indexing and evenness checks align, and the spec equates output to this function.
